body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: inference competition bootstrap
body.intention: I intend that predicted side effects of the competition bootstrap are observed and annotated within 14 days of shipping.
body.description:
**What changed:** Created competition schema + reading pipeline config + two competing classifiers + eval harness for memory type classification on programming books.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) competition schema adds Postgres maintenance surface — needs to not be confused with production clan schema; (2) reading pipeline schema param could silently deposit to wrong schema if param is misspelled; (3) book_learner labels used as ground truth may be noisy — winning classifier may be optimizing against imperfect labels; (4) k-NN classifier quality depends heavily on embedding coverage — if drain loop hasn't run, graph-first starts at a disadvantage.
**Signals to watch:** competition.memories and clan.memories row counts stay independent; reading pipeline production runs still deposit to clan only; eval scorecard accuracy is non-trivial (>50% for both classifiers — if either scores near random, label noise is the likely cause).
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-24 or when T-competition-eval-harness closes.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
